text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right! There's nothing as refreshing as some
honey quince syrup. Now my throat and body are
in top form!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Time to go out on stage!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've held firm and toughed it out. Now's my
chance to show everyone the results of all that
dedication!
